  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail/rmilter         Makefile distinfo 
  Log:
  Update to 1.5.24.

  ability to save messages with specific spamd symbols (for testing custom rules)
  
  PR:             137754
  Submitted by:   Sylvio Cesar <scjamorim at bsd.com.br>
